description: Mercantile letter addressed to a son. In Judaeo-Arabic, with some lines on verso in Arabic script. Mentioning wheat; instructions him not to stay in Fustat or Egypt; Alexandria; a certain Nissim; and the ship of al-Ṭansāwī (cf. T-S 8J16.31 and T-S 8J19.25). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
